query:
-- Full contact trust tier breakdown
SELECT contactTrustTier, enrichmentSource, COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts
GROUP BY contactTrustTier, enrichmentSource
ORDER BY contactTrustTier, count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute

SELECT contactTrustTier, enrichmentSource, COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts
GROUP BY contactTrustTier, enrichmentSource
ORDER BY contactTrustTier, count DESC;
